choices: Bart's first day back in the 4th grade with his sisters
1.content:
While Bart is playing video games and watching tv instead of studying. Lisa on the other hand is in her room studying. When all of a sudden Maggie walks into Lisa's room and asks Lisa to help her study. Lisa says to Maggie. "Maggie I'm busy studying for my own achievement test, but I know someone outside our household that will help you study."

Lisa then says. "You know what Maggie how about you help me study for my test." So Maggie thinks it over and then says. "Ok Lisa I'll help you and can I come with you to your classroom." Lisa says. "I don't know about you coming to class with me, because how are you going to get out of your own achievement test." So the sisters being studying, while Bart continues to goof off.

Halfway through studying Lisa starts asking Maggie some of the questions from her test and is completely shocked and amazed by how Maggie is able to recall all the correct answers. Lisa then skips ahead to some questions that the two didn't even look at yet, and once again Maggie proves that she's just as smart as Lisa.

Lisa says. "Ok Maggie lets take a break and see how Bart is doing with his studying." Maggie immediately starts laughing before saying out loud. "What does Bart's studying method even look like." This causes Lisa to start laughing as they walk into Bart's room. Bart says. "What so funny Maggie and Lisa?"

Lisa says. "O Maggie was helping me study for my achievement test, and I said that we should take a break and see how your studying is going." Lisa then says. "Maggie tell Bart what you said while you were laughing." Maggie then says. "I immediately asked Lisa while I was laughing, what does Bart's studying method even look like."

Where do you want fast forward to?
1.title: How Bart got stuck with his sisters in 4th grade

11.content:
The achievement test is today at Springfield elementary. So once Bart, Lisa, and Maggie get off the bus at school. Bart says. "Good luck on your test Maggie and Lisa before they head off to their own classrooms." His sisters say. "Thanks for wishing us good luck Bart, but you're going to need it more than us." With that said Lisa walks Maggie down to her preschool class before Lisa goes to her 3rd grade classroom.

Meanwhile as Bart and Lisa are taking their tests, Maggie on the other hand finished her test within one minute after all her classmates had a test in front of them. The teacher is shocked when she sees Maggie turning in her test. The teacher then notices Maggie doing the potty dance and so she asks Maggie if she needs to go potty. The teacher says. "Maggie do you need to go potty." Maggie answers back saying. "Yes I need to go potty, but can I take a harder test."

So with that said Maggie is excused to go potty, and her teacher calls Skinner and says. "I can't believe it Skinner that a preschooler could finish the achievement test in under a minute and then ask me if they could take a harder achievement test." Skinner then asks the preschool teacher by saying. "May I ask you which preschooler are you talking about."

The teacher answers back saying. "Skinner could you have Lisa Simpson report to the preschool with a copy of the 3rs grade achievement test." Skinner then says. "I'm going to guess that it's Bart's and Lisa's baby sister Maggie, and what's she doing now that she's done with the test." The teacher says. "You guessed correctly Skinner it's Maggie, and she's going potty right now." The teacher then says. "Hey Gerald could you please go check in on Maggie, because it's been awhile since she was excused to go potty." Gerald says. "Yes I'll go check on Maggie after all you did make us potty buddies." So Gerald walks over to the potty room, and knocks on the door saying. "Hey Maggie are you ok in there, because the teacher is getting worried." Maggie answers back saying. "I'm almost done going potty Gerald."

So a few minutes later a very happy and relieved Maggie returns to her seat. Meanwhile Skinner then calls Lisa's teacher to tell her to send Lisa down to the preschool with a copy of the 4th grade achievement test. So as Lisa continues taking her test. Her teacher calls her up to the teacher's desk. So as Lisa is walking up to the desk. Her fellow classmates start saying. "Lisa is in trouble!" Lisa starts crying and says. "Am I in trouble!" Her teacher says. "Lisa come with me!" Once outside the classroom the teacher walks Lisa down the hall. So her fellow classmates can't hear their conversation.

The teacher says. "Don't worry Lisa you're not in trouble." The teacher then hands Lisa a blank test and says. "Here take this test down to the preschool, because there's a certain preschooler who requested to take a harder achievement test after completing their own." Lisa then says. "I know exactly who the certain preschooler is, it's my sister Maggie and she wants to take the 3rd achievement test after helping me study."

The teacher is shocked at what Lisa just said. The teacher then says. "Yes Lisa you're correct it's your sister Maggie, and between the two of us I'm giving you an a+." So with that said Lisa ran down the halls to the preschool, and her teacher returned to her classroom. So before any of Lisa's classmates could ask about why the teacher had to talk to Lisa. The teacher says. "Principal Skinner got a phone call from the preschool asking Lisa to bring a test down to her sister Maggie."

Now back to Lisa. Just as Lisa is coming around the corner to the last hallway on way to the preschool. Maggie runs up to Lisa and says and before hugging Lisa. "Look at my achievement test Lisa." Maggie hands her test to Lisa as she start to hug Lisa. Lisa looks at Maggie's test and says. "Wow Maggie you got them all correct just like I did when I was in preschool."

So Lisa says as she hands Maggie the 3rd grade achievement test. "I'm so proud of you Maggie, and especially because you're following after me instead of Bart." So Maggie and Lisa hug each other one more time, before Lisa says. "I'll be waiting outside while you take the test, and when you're done we'll both walk to my classroom." Lisa says. "Once we get to my classroom Maggie, I'll let you hand the achievement test to my teacher." Lisa then tells Maggie. "I know you're going to ace it Maggie."

So Maggie walks back into her classroom at starts working on the 3rd grade achievement test, and just like how fast it took her to take the preschool achievement test. She is soon done with the 3rd grade achievement test. She then walks out of her classroom and says to Lisa I'm done. Lisa quickly glances through the test and says. "Omg my sister aced it and she's only 2yrs old!"

Lisa quickly congratulates Maggie before the run to Lisa's 3rd grade classroom. Once inside the classroom Maggie walks up to teacher and hands over the completed test. Immediately after checking Maggie's test the takes Maggie and Lisa into the hallway and says. "I've never seen two people ace the 3rd grade achievement test before, and especially when one of them is a preschooler." Lisa's teacher then says. "I'll have principal Skinner put you two in 4th grade." Do Maggie and Lisa keep the fact that they are both going into 4th grade?
11.title: The day of the test

choices: Pranks his teacher and Skinner for letting his sisters move up to 4th grade
Ditches school and blows off steam at the arcade
12.content:
So Bart, Maggie, and Lisa a long with their current classmates wait around to find out the results of their achievement test. So Maggie and Gerald are looking at their scores on the preschool achievement test. Gerald says. "Wow Maggie we both aced the achievement test and will be in kindergarten next week." Maggie then says. "I'm actually going to be in 4th grade with my brother who is getting put back in 4th grade, and my sister who is going into the 4th grade."

Gerald then says. "Well congrats to you and your sister, but how do you think your brother will react." Maggie says. "He already hates the fact that me and our sister are smarter than him, and so I think this is just going to make him lose his mind." Lisa then walks over and says. "Maggie can you believe it that we get to skip ahead while Bart is held back." Maggie says. "I know Lisa and wonderful that we're successful in school, but I can just picture Bart pulling a prank after he finds out about it."

Bart simply walks right past Maggie and Lisa. Maggie says. "Ay caramba Lisa! Bart didn't even say anything to us." Lisa then says. "Omg that can't be good Maggie, and he's definitely going to prank someone over it." Does Bart actually pull a prank on someone or does he ditch school and go to the arcade?
12.title: The test results

info.brief_description: After Bart fails the achievement test, and both sisters ace it. They end up in 4th grade
info.description: This story takes place with 12yr old Bart in 5th grade, 10yr old Lisa in 3rd grade, and 2yr old Maggie in preschool.
info.pretty_title: Lisa and Maggie are Bart's classmates
